content.description:
The `content` map on items is schema-free — the kernel doesn't enforce what goes in it. But conventions have emerged for standard field names to enable consistent tooling and views.

## Standard Fields

### Universal Fields

| Field | Type | Purpose | Used By |
|-------|------|---------|--------|
| `description` | String (markdown) | Primary content body | Notes, type definitions, documentation |
| `tags` | String[] (item IDs) | Classification references | Any item |
| `parent` | String (item ID) | Taxonomical hierarchy | Tags, categories |
| `category` | String | View filtering hint | Views (e.g., `"hidden"` excludes from menus) |

### Code Item Fields

| Field | Type | Purpose | Used By |
|-------|------|---------|--------|
| `code` | String (JavaScript) | Executable source code | All code items |
| `for_type` | String (item ID) | Which type this view renders | Views |
| `ui_hints` | Object[] | Declarative field layout | View specs |
| `watches` | Object[] | Declarative event subscriptions | Libraries with event handlers |
| `_symbols` | Object | Auto-generated symbol table | Code items (line numbers, kinds, scopes) |

### View Configuration Fields

| Field | Type | Purpose | Used By |
|-------|------|---------|--------|
| `for_type` | String (item ID) | Target type | Views, view specs |
| `ui_hints` | Array | Field rendering instructions | View specs |
| `fieldView` | String | Which field view to use | UI hint entries |
| `mode` | String | `readonly` or `editable` | Field views |

### Spatial Fields (in attachment `view` objects)

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `x`, `y` | Number | Position in pixels |
| `width`, `height` | Number | Size in pixels |
| `z` | Number | Stacking order |
| `minimized` | Boolean | Window minimized state |
| `maximized` | Boolean | Window maximized state |
| `pinned` | Boolean | Prevent accidental movement |

### Watch Fields

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `event` | String | Event type to watch (e.g., `item:updated`) |
| `type` | String (item ID) | Filter: only items of exactly this type |
| `typeExtends` | String (item ID) | Filter: items whose type chain includes this |
| `id` | String (item ID) | Filter: only this specific item |

## Naming Patterns

- **Underscore prefix** (`_symbols`): auto-generated, not user-editable
- **camelCase**: standard for all content fields
- **No dots in field names**: use nested objects instead

## When to Use Which

- **`description`** — primary markdown content for any item
- **`code`** — executable JavaScript (only for code items)
- **`tags`** — classification (prefer over adding custom fields)
- **`parent`** — hierarchical organization (tags, categories)
- **`for_type`** — always on views and view specs

## See Also

- [Tags & Classification](item://c0c0c0c0-0021-0000-0000-000000000000) — Tag field semantics
- [Rendering & Views](item://c0c0c0c0-0022-0000-0000-000000000000) — View spec fields
- [Event System](item://c0c0c0c0-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) — Watch field semantics
- [Spatial Windowing](item://c0c0c0c0-0020-0000-0000-000000000000) — Position fields
